prompt: Show me geographic lending gaps. Which states have the largest differences in approval rates between white and non-white applicants in 2024?

assertions.name: sql_file_created
assertions.description: A query.sql file is created with valid SQL syntax

assertions.name: race_segmentation
assertions.description: SQL segments applicants by race (white vs non-white)

assertions.name: disparity_metric
assertions.description: Results include approval rate difference between white and non-white applicants for each state

assertions.name: identifies_largest_gaps
assertions.description: Query identifies and ranks states with largest approval disparities

assertions.name: summary_report_exists
assertions.description: A summary.txt report is generated with key findings

assertions.name: report_calls_out_top_disparities
assertions.description: Report highlights top 3-5 states with largest gaps and provides context
